description_long: This object is an old, weathered folding camera with a textured, dark leather exterior and metallic accents. The bellows are made of a faded, brownish material, showing signs of age and use, and are extended from the main body. The front features a circular lens assembly marked 'ROX', surrounded by metallic rings and adjustment dials. The top and sides display embossed patterns and metallic hardware, including winding knobs and a latch mechanism. The back is mostly flat with two small windows and a sliding latch, while the base has a metal hinge and support struts. The overall appearance is robust, with a mix of hard, textured surfaces and intricate mechanical details.
description: A vintage folding camera with a textured leather body, extended bellows, and metallic hardware, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the extended bellows, lens assembly, and metallic support struts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the camera body, winding knob, and the bellows' side profile.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the flat, textured surface with two small windows and a sliding latch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hinge, metallic hardware, and the bellows' attachment to the body.
